title: M7 Sample Full Report - 2026-06-27
summary: Sample full report JSON used to test the manual daily update flow. Full Report is permanently retained but is not used for future rollup readback.

sections.heading: Executive Summary
sections.body: Sample report covering AI infrastructure, device refresh, and supply chain watch items. This is not real market data and not investment advice.

sections.heading: Top3 Detail
sections.body: The daily Top3 belongs in dashboard.json, previous-daily.json, and current-week.json. The full report can provide readable detail, but future rollups should not read it.

sections.heading: Process Note
sections.body: A manual daily update should add dated JSON files, update latest.json, update calendar-manifest.json, and refresh context files without changing the main website framework.
